Localization.Description: A user started the process as another user or with an account for making outgoing connections

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} started the process {object.process.name} as the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started the process {object.process.name}, which uses a user account {object.account.name} for outgoing connections on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started the process {object.process.name}, which uses a computer account {object.account.name} for outgoing connections on host {event_src.host}
